calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter T. Churchill for Carol Abrahams (Adminstrator).

The Court stated that the only issue was the extraordinary fees. Mr. Churchill stated that the only work he associated with extraordinary services was related to preventing the property from going into foreclosure and working with Chase Bank. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Rosie Noguera.
